text:
In the first scene, I feel like an observer of structured minds at work, separated by glass and silence, reflecting on the discipline of learning—curious but somewhat detached, sensing the order and purpose in collective intellectual pursuit.

In the second scene, the vibrance of color and bold letters "R+D" evoke a feeling of excitement and possibility. Here, research and creativity merge—the space is alive with innovation. I feel inspired, drawn by the invitation to explore how humans connect, discover, and shape new futures.
